name: url
label: URL
help: TikTok profile URL, e.g. https://tiktok.com/@username. Not a YouTube channel URL. The URL platform must match this tool's platform. Do not pass cross-platform URLs, e.g. YouTube to TikTok, Instagram to Facebook, LinkedIn to X/Twitter, or Pinterest to Rumble.

name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Flat 2 credits per call.

name: cursor
label: Cursor
help: Pagination cursor. Leave empty for the first page; then pass the nextCursor value returned in the previous response.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Set true to serve from the 24h response cache. Default false — always fetch fresh data.
